title: Lakebase Autoscaling now available in AWS Tokyo region (ap-northeast-1) ​
body:
**June 30, 2026**

Lakebase Autoscaling is now available in `ap-northeast-1` (Asia Pacific - Tokyo). For all supported regions, see [Region availability](/aws/en/oltp/projects/manage-projects#availability). To get started, see [Get a Postgres database](/aws/en/oltp/projects/get-started).
